 - Next billing window is strong (~$54k), so raise only C quota again from 350k to 500k while keeping costs flat. This targets high-ARPA Scale users and leaves Pro unchanged.
 - Hold tier 3 capacity, C tier 4, no ads/dev, $500 global ops + $2k S2 ops. Repeat $9 E3 rescue offers.

+Week 23 / day 154 observations:
+- Cash improved to $30.8k on a strong billing window. C quota at 500k did not increase usage or cause reliability issues, but churn remains high at 78.
+- Active MRR is about $180k and next billing window is around $42k, close to expected weekly costs. Do not add spend.
+- Social still complains about quotas and support, but raising C quota again could create a compute shock. Hold C quota at 500k this week and measure another cycle.
+- Week 23 action: hold prices, quotas, C tier 4, tier 3 capacity, no ads/dev, lean S2 ops; repeat $9 E3 offers.
